phrases.intent_en: Where do tour guides meet groups
phrases.text_local: Wo treffen sich die Reisegruppen mit ihren Guides?
phrases.cultural_note: Tour groups commonly meet at recognizable landmarks or bridge accesses.

likely_response.translation_en: On the Danube promenade, at the main entrance.

responses.english: On the Danube promenade, at the main entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Can I pay street vendors with card
phrases.text_local: Kann man bei den Straßenhändlern mit Karte zahlen?
phrases.cultural_note: Card acceptance at street vendors varies; cash is still common.

likely_response.local: Meist bar, aber manche auch Karte.
likely_response.translation_en: Cash mostly, but some accept card.

responses.english: Cash mostly, but some accept card.
responses.french: Meist bar, aber manche auch Karte.

phrases.intent_en: Where are the river cruise ticket sellers
phrases.text_local: Wo gibt es Tickets für die Donauschifffahrt?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket counters are often centrally located near pedestrian bridges or major walkway accesses.

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket counter up ahead.

responses.english: At the ticket counter up ahead.
